description: List of names and sums. Headed "Monday the 13th . .. for Ḥalfon Kohen." Entries mention: Bū Naṣr a dyer (ṣabbāgh); a transfer (ḥawwāla) from Bū l-ʿIzz; Bū l-Faḍl b. Mardūkh; Bū l-Faraj an assayer (naqqād); Ibn Nājī al-Sharābī; Maʿānī b. al-Dayyan; Ibn Abū ʿImrān Levi Sharābī; Bū Saʿd Kohen; Bū l-Munā. On verso it says "al-Shaykh al-Rashīd Samawʾal (סמוול)." The last person mentioned is known from several other documents from the early 13th century.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
